---
title: "Chris Varghese"
---

![](assets/front-figure.svg){.front-figure fig-alt="Blue academic illustration of a hospital campus with data and AI motifs"}

::: {.home-grid}
::: {.intro}
### Chris Varghese

I am a clinician-scientist and data scientist working across surgery, artificial intelligence, perioperative outcomes, and digital biomarkers. My work focuses on building practical data-driven tools for surgical care, with interests spanning surgical AI, postoperative monitoring, gastrointestinal physiology, and collaborative clinical research.
:::

::: {.news}
### Current focus

Surgical AI, risk prediction, postoperative recovery, pancreas cancer detection, and non-invasive biomarkers of gastric function.
:::
:::
